© 2026 Raximjon Tulaganov — Built with Next.js & TailwindCSS

Mathematics · English · Guitar · Calisthenics

Barcha loyihalar
02 / 10 Open Source

CodeSandbox — Pixel-Perfect HTML/CSS Layout

HTML5CSS3FlexboxGridPixel-Perfect
Live ko'rishGitHub

Loyiha haqida

Dizayn maketidan pixel-perfect HTML/CSS layout yaratish ko'nikmalarini namoyish etuvchi loyiha. Semantic HTML5 elementlari, toza CSS (Flexbox va Grid), shrift integratsiyasi (fonts/ papkasi). Responsive va chiziqli vizual hiyerarxiya. Har bir detalga e'tibor berib ishlanma — spacing, tipografiya, rang palitrasiga qat'iy rioya qilingan.

Oldingi

Client — Multi-Page Corporate Website

Keyingi

E-Commerce Website (Vanilla JS + SCSS)
